title: Lieberman's 'Last Chance' Auction Mechanism Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential decision-making process for a bidder in a 'last chance' auction, a key concept from Eugene (Evy) Lieberman's research on preventing algorithmic collusion.
relationships: Bidder's Algorithm observes the Auction Platform
Algorithm evaluates the Current Auction Round
Algorithm decides if this is the Final Bid
If not final, it places a standard competitive bid
If final, it may trigger a 'Last Chance Offer' (a supra-competitive bid)
This leads to a collusive outcome if other algorithms are similarly programmed
